description_long: This is a two-story rectangular house with a beige brick exterior and a flat roof. The front facade features a central door, multiple white-framed windows, and a small awning above one window. The house is surrounded by a white railing and includes a fenced backyard with outdoor furniture, a swing set, a fire pit, and a potted plant. The rear of the house has a large window and a patio area with a table and chairs, while the side features a deck. The overall design is simple and modern, with clean lines and minimal ornamentation. The windows are arranged in regular rows, and the entryway is straightforward with a single door and no porch.
description: A modern, two-story beige brick house with a flat roof, white-framed windows, and a fenced backyard featuring outdoor furniture and a swing set. The design is clean and minimal, with a central entry door and regular window arrangement.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entry door, symmetrical windows, and a small awning above one window.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the large window, backyard patio with table and chairs, and the fenced outdoor area.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backyard with a swing set, fire pit, outdoor seating, and a potted plant.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the deck, additional windows, and the continuation of the backyard fence.
attribute_entryway_design: Single central door with a small awning, no porch, and minimal decorative elements.
